A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After its casehistory query for owner transfers in the last 4 quarters returned an empty list (var_function-call-116452615764005293), the agent assumed all agents had zero transfers and then arbitrarily picked the lexicographically smallest owner from cases created in the period (var_function-call-3470870367608630863 via execute_python), instead of correctly computing transfer counts, leading to the wrong ID.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
